headline: Work With Me
subheadline: Product design and front-end engineering for teams who want to ship something people love using.
tagline: Product Design • Design Systems • React • Accessibility

whatIDo.headline: I design and build the front end.
whatIDo.body: I help teams turn fuzzy product ideas into interfaces that feel obvious — clear flows, a coherent design system, and production-ready front-end code that engineers want to maintain.

engagements.headline: Ways to collaborate

tiers.title: Design Sprint
tiers.description: Turn a concept into a clickable prototype you can test, pitch, or hand off.
bullets: Flows, wireframes, and a high-fidelity prototype
Ideal for validating a feature before you build it

tiers.title: UI & Accessibility Audit
tiers.description: A practical review of your product's interface and accessibility, with prioritized fixes.

tiers.title: Fractional Front-End
tiers.description: Ongoing design + front-end help for teams that need senior hands without a full-time hire.
bullets: Feature ownership, design-system work, and code review
Embedded with your team or working in parallel

engagements.footnote: Every project is different — treat these as starting points. I'll shape scope around your goals before we begin.

howIWork.headline: Clear, fast, collaborative.
howIWork.body: I've worked solo, inside product teams, and embedded with cross-functional groups. I know how to lead a design decision, support engineers, and keep things moving without stepping on toes.

values.title: User-first thinking
values.description: Every decision goes through "does this help the person using it?"

values.title: Bias toward shipping
values.description: Real, testable progress beats perfect plans

values.title: Accessible by default
values.description: Inclusive design is part of the work, not a phase at the end

values.title: Prototype early
values.description: Show, don't tell — get something clickable fast

clientTypes.label: Early-stage startups finding their product shape
Product teams scaling a design system
Teams that need a senior design-engineering hybrid
Anyone wrestling with UI clarity or accessibility

ctaSection.headline: Ready to talk?
ctaSection.subheadline: Quick chat, zero pressure. Tell me what you're building.

closing.body: Good products feel inevitable in hindsight. My job is to help your team get there — with design that's clear and code that lasts. Let's build something people remember.
